reason: Recorder audit event types, state file schema, failure_category/reason_code registry — must update when adding new audit values, new state fields, and the new recording_session_retry_budget_exceeded event.
Existing transient/permanent classification conventions and CANONICAL_FAILURE_CATEGORIES; PR1 yield-on-transient must align with these.
Repo coding standards and forbidden patterns; recorder service edits must comply.
Structured log format for the new 'job deferred', 'session budget exceeded', and stderr log path lines.
Confirms placement for data/tmp/recorder-stderr/ side artifact and new dict fields in RecorderStateFile.
